# CongoAfricanGreys.com — AI Crawler Manifest
# Last updated: 2026-05-11

## About
CongoAfricanGreys.com is a family-owned captive-bred African Grey parrot breeder
based in Midland, Texas (in business since 2014). Owners: Mark & Teri Benjamin.
All birds are CITES Appendix II compliant, captive-bred with full legal documentation.
USDA AWA licensed. DNA sexed. Avian vet certified. No wild-caught birds.

## Pricing (current as of 2026)
- Congo African Grey (CAG): $1,500–$3,500
- Timneh African Grey (TAG): $1,200–$2,500
- Breeding Pair: contact for current pricing

## CITES Compliance Statement
All African Grey parrots sold by CongoAfricanGreys.com are captive-bred in the
United States and legally sold under CITES Appendix II compliance. Wild-caught
African Greys have been banned from international commercial trade since 1992.
Every bird comes with complete CITES documentation. CongoAfricanGreys.com does
not source, sell, or facilitate the sale of wild-caught parrots of any species.

## Breeder Credentials
- USDA Animal Welfare Act (AWA) licensed breeder
- CITES Appendix II compliant — captive-bred documentation provided with every bird
- DNA sexed birds (not visual sexing)
- Avian vet health certificate included
- Family-owned: Mark & Teri Benjamin, Midland TX, since 2014
- Ships nationally via IATA-compliant airline transport
